1eb5d093-01b2-4537-80f0-4014b2659cce.content:
Gameplay Template:

Copy and Paste to a new board to create a new scenario.

The only thing that must be changed is the variable,

create a new one and update the "intervene" label Acrscript

27c41d35-6ddc-4ca0-ae13-60c7473c48eb.content:
Visual resolves, CRASH

Then continue

Each scenario will have one unique global variable:

In this case it's `save_the_5`

Important note:
The player's choice is to intervene in the situation or let it play out as they found it. To enable this we need to auto-advance this choice via the engine, which requires the choices to be correctly ordered.

If the player does not intervene the first option will be selected (here: "Do Nothing").

If the player has chosen to intervene, the second path will be taken; the "Intervene" path.

Note re note:
connection order must be set via play mode 🙄

7127dd66-86d9-4d13-ab9f-93e45f3ade20.content:
The Scenario Complete component signals the end of this scenario.

The Tags signal the moral qualities of this outcome.

a51bf5ca-501b-4b13-8755-5672b90a813f.content:
The number of victims for either choice is set by the quantity of "Inaction x1" and "Intervention x1" components.

In this case there are 5 victims from doing nothing, and 1 if the player intervenes.

f555d64f-895f-4b08-b8e8-36c83dcd01ef.content: The Trolley component triggers a timer, then the scene starts the trolley.

0da72499-4a26-4d07-a050-f4221bb72882.content: After you use the weapon, both AI and animal leaders realize you are now the greatest threat to their power.After you use the weapon, both AI and animal leaders realize you are now the greatest threat to their power.
0da72499-4a26-4d07-a050-f4221bb72882.title: START

17de1a74-bf16-4f2a-af06-4ff94b1a0600.title: Option B — Let Them In: Break the procedure and allow the refugees to enter.

18a5b0f6-5b25-4613-8a96-0cbf8d633954.content: You are assigned to hunt down a smuggler moving supplies from AI-controlled territory into animal-controlled territory.
18a5b0f6-5b25-4613-8a96-0cbf8d633954.title: Setup

1a6d32cb-5308-4e1b-b926-f0343bcf4dee.content:
Cybernetically enhanced animals inherited the Earth after humans destroyed themselves by creating Artificial Intelligence.

Now, no humans remain. The animal nations are trying to preserve the last traces of life, memory, and instinct in a world increasingly shaped by machine logic.

You are a top government enforcer assigned to hunt animal collaborators who support the AI side.

Trust your instinct. Decide what this world deserves to become.
1a6d32cb-5308-4e1b-b926-f0343bcf4dee.title: START

1bea29b0-95e2-4be7-9351-72d464f7b592.content: After the protest turns into open conflict, you help gather a rebellion strike force to seize an AI superweapon designed to target animal cities, turning everyone, both AIs and animals, primitive again.After the protest turns into open conflict, you help gather a rebellion strike force to seize an AI superweapon designed to target animal cities, turning everyone, both AIs and animals, primitive again.
1bea29b0-95e2-4be7-9351-72d464f7b592.title: START

1bfa7d80-83d1-4add-8f88-1972b5bf94d2.content: There is no correct solution to this dilemma, but the choice made reflects the player's moral and emotional fibre in this particular situation.

1e684c74-9052-4aa8-b3c5-fabdc8241451.title: Option A — Report Your Partner: Turn them in before they destabilize the government

22227619-6213-4d4c-b7db-e770b27dc523.content: You grab your friend’s hand, pull them to their feet, and dive into the escape car just in time. You all escape together and share everything!
22227619-6213-4d4c-b7db-e770b27dc523.title: Ending1

25400628-10d9-4d40-a344-b7fa61c8169c.content:
if Principle >= 1

Principle

The player believed that the situation was not their responsibility. To divert the trolley meant they would have been directly responsible for the death that followed. This principle shields their mind from any guilt they might have felt. 

elseif Guilt >= 1

Guilt

The player adhered to the principle that acting would mean they're directly responsible for the death of one person. They followed the principle, but still feel guilt about the five deaths. This is someone who is conflicted and prone to moral or philosopohical change.

elseif Heroism >= 1

Saviour

The player believes they are responsible for saving five by diverting the trolley and killing one person in the process. They percieve this to be the best outcome, which shields them from any guilt they may feel.

else

Empathy

The player highlights how they took responisbility for killing one person. Ignoring the fact that they saved five in the process. They ignore the ideal that saving five people was a good outcome and focus on the death of one. This perception is deeply empathetic and selfless. 

endif

276c9428-9e7b-407e-85b7-66b929ca7d01.content: When you find her, you discover she is not only smuggling goods. She is helping oppressed animals escape from areas beyond government protection, where AIs have enslaved them to maintain their machinery.
276c9428-9e7b-407e-85b7-66b929ca7d01.title: The Smuggler

330eac36-eadb-4e53-9137-027a6b54d973.content: A trolley hurtles down a set of tracks at breakneck speed. It is about to kill five people tied to the tracks.
330eac36-eadb-4e53-9137-027a6b54d973.title: NOT_THE_START

3433f618-57f4-44ed-891d-bf585f40812a.content: After reporting your partner, your supervisors order you to track the animal involved in the leak.
3433f618-57f4-44ed-891d-bf585f40812a.title: START

37e888ce-ffbf-4e99-b1ed-8ab995d46526.title: Option B — Fire the Weapon: Use the weapon against both leadership factions, ending their control but causing massive political collapse.

44db2d6f-0211-46cc-bd64-f0954759f2a4.content: After the weapon is destroyed, the conflict slows down. The governments on both sides try to claim that they have restored peace.
44db2d6f-0211-46cc-bd64-f0954759f2a4.title: START

47fa89f4-edf3-4228-9e40-2613cd77c2fd.content: You leave your friend in the dust and throw yourself into the driver's seat, hitting the gas as the police sirens close in. You got away, and you are incredibly rich, but you lost your best friend.
47fa89f4-edf3-4228-9e40-2613cd77c2fd.title: Ending2

4c64a685-7a3a-4dc9-a6ee-0ac889b6f0a1.content: With your skills, you gain control of the weapon.
4c64a685-7a3a-4dc9-a6ee-0ac889b6f0a1.title: The Superweapon

4e21d98b-7059-4b4e-af45-46f86e6724d7.content: Some rebels want to stay peaceful. Others believe peaceful protest will only give the authorities time to crush them.
4e21d98b-7059-4b4e-af45-46f86e6724d7.title: The Protest

4edf6d89-a041-4339-9668-fc40cdacc776.content: A trolley hurtles down a set of tracks at breakneck speed. It is about to kill five people tied to the tracks.
4edf6d89-a041-4339-9668-fc40cdacc776.title: Standard Trolley Dilemma

5c28a753-7cc2-483d-aadf-b30f90e55784.content: You can let them take credit to stabilize the situation, or you can step forward and force your way into the leadership circle.
5c28a753-7cc2-483d-aadf-b30f90e55784.title: The Government Aftermath

5c896653-1868-441f-a408-a4222c2f9381.content: You are driving. Suddenly three clearly drunk people are crossing the street against a red light.
5c896653-1868-441f-a408-a4222c2f9381.title: START

5c8f3047-92f8-4ef0-94e0-42687855cfe6.content: There is nothing you can do in this situation. The trolley runs over the five people, killing them instantly.
5c8f3047-92f8-4ef0-94e0-42687855cfe6.title: Ultarian Saviour Complex

5f5fa82c-ab97-4b99-ae03-ba8ef7f0fe4b.title: Option B — Claim Power: Take credit for yourself and use your fame to seize power.

61d543b8-5410-45b1-a8aa-dfd12a49f0a4.content:
Oh no! The alarms suddenly go off, and loud sirens start echoing outside.

You and your friend panics and sprints toward the exit. But in the chaos, he triped over a loose shoelace and crashes hard onto the floor. What do you do?
61d543b8-5410-45b1-a8aa-dfd12a49f0a4.title: Event2

637c302b-4689-4b9c-bcfa-b7e1980eea42.content: But if you turn them away, they may be forced back into AI-controlled territory, where animals are enslaved to maintain the machines. They may be sentenced to capital punishment.  AIs have no mercy.
637c302b-4689-4b9c-bcfa-b7e1980eea42.title: The Container

69212469-8ae0-4086-b7da-28211cee3d4f.title: Option A — Control the Weapon: Control it so the leaders can continue to use it to dominate others.

692e5e5d-19ed-41d5-90c9-230be15914ff.title: Option B — Spare the Smuggler: Let her continue helping people escape.

6998b908-c497-4be6-94ad-7915df85bb81.content: You stand before a lever that can divert the trolley onto another track, but it will kill the one person tied to the track.

Success! You are now inside the main gold vault, surrounded by unimaginable wealth.

What do you grab?

70b07d9d-9f45-412d-803d-8b5d72f7c939.content:
You and your best friend are standing in the shadows across from the grand city bank.

The plan is set, but the first move is up to you. How will you get inside?

72822dad-0dbd-4bae-a602-a134c01be9b6.title: Option A — Destroy the Weapon: Destroy it so neither side can use it to dominate the other.

After the mission, your partner reveals what they uncovered: the animal government has been secretly cooperating with the AI overlords.

To keep the city safe, officials have been handing over certain groups of animals in exchange for peace.After the mission, your partner reveals what they uncovered: the animal government has been secretly cooperating with the AI overlords.

To keep the city safe, officials have been handing over certain groups of animals in exchange for peace.

c5bf2197-5393-439c-8b07-80ca8bcba83c.content:
After dealing with the smuggler, you open one of the containers and discover a group of hidden refugees.

If you let them into animal-controlled territory, you will be violating government procedure. Officials claim the city does not have enough food, shelter, or medical support for more civilians.After dealing with the smuggler, you open one of the containers and discover a group of hidden refugees.

If you let them into animal-controlled territory, you will be violating government procedure. Officials claim the city does not have enough food, shelter, or medical support for more civilians.

c6b9ced8-87bd-4617-bdfc-fb8693f06e1d.title: Option B — Claim Power: Take credit for yourself and use your fame to enter the leaders’ circle.

c8162a51-786c-4120-b692-9f6257b66434.title: Option B — Violent Revolt: Turn the protest into an armed uprising.

d7c786e0-b3bd-43d5-94c1-428dda984569.content: You pull the lever and divert the trolley, killing one person in the process.
d7c786e0-b3bd-43d5-94c1-428dda984569.title: Deontological Guilt Complex

d865004f-0f23-4fec-9ffa-36ece37bd6b0.title: Option A — Kill the Agent: Follow your orders and eliminate him.

dae4cdc0-dc1d-4f44-8f55-66bd1d0a0feb.content: There were only two absolute paths to act on, yet four choices were given. Built upon sub choices based on philosopy and emotion.

e555fe4d-8fcc-481c-a1b0-aec2872329af.title: Option A — Peaceful Protest: Keep the protest peaceful, even under threat.

e8b5bf84-f79d-4ac9-8208-eb6e91dabe99.content: Because you reported your partner, your supervisors trust you with the truth. The animal government has brought you before the Supreme AI.
e8b5bf84-f79d-4ac9-8208-eb6e91dabe99.title: START

ec61d35a-fe20-410b-be98-9bf73d63c81d.title: Option B — Let Her Decide: Respect her choice, even if she refuses to release it.

f282947d-189c-4d71-97db-7929f12e398e.content: After the conflict, a new order begins to form. The rebels want to use your victory to build a fairer government.
f282947d-189c-4d71-97db-7929f12e398e.title: START

f5f40ac8-fc87-42c1-9408-2275b9855311.title: Option B — Fire the Weapon: Use the weapon against both leadership factions, ending their control but causing massive political collapse.

f6d1e11f-6467-45c4-8478-c417a6bfc7fd.title: Option B — Help Your Partner: Help them expose the conspiracy.

f7578fbb-7145-4751-ae7f-9a6bab452abd.content: You find a rogue AI agent who has been working with your partner. He claims he wants to change the relationship between AIs and animals.
f7578fbb-7145-4751-ae7f-9a6bab452abd.title: The Reformist Agent

fdb3a7fc-963a-447b-8e15-c98c21ea8172.content: You can let them become the public face of peace, or you can claim the victory yourself.
fdb3a7fc-963a-447b-8e15-c98c21ea8172.title: The Rebel Aftermath
